app.name: Vía
app.tagline: Your copilot on the GLP-1 journey
app.description: Track your doses, your weight, and how you feel. Get clear answers, in your language, no fluff.

landing.hero_title: The missing companion for your GLP-1 journey
landing.hero_sub: Built for people on Ozempic, Wegovy, Mounjaro, Zepbound — branded or compounded. Your personal log, your AI coach, Spanish-first, English-ready.
landing.features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
landing.feature_log_desc: One tap to log a dose, weight, or symptom. No endless forms.
landing.feature_coach_desc: Ask anything about food, hydration, injection site rotation. Answers in seconds.
landing.feature_privacy_desc: End-to-end encrypted. Export anytime. We don't sell data.
landing.disclaimer: This app does not replace your doctor. We do not prescribe or sell medication.

auth.magic_link_sent: We sent you a magic link. Check your email.

onboarding.welcome_title: Tell us a bit about you
onboarding.welcome_sub: Three quick questions and you're in.

dashboard.streak_days: {count, plural, one {# day streak} other {# day streak}}

dose.title: Log dose
dose.add_first_medication_sub: You don't have any medications saved yet. Start here.

coach.title: Coach
coach.placeholder: Ask anything about your GLP-1 day
coach.quota_exhausted: You've used your free questions for today. Go Pro for unlimited.
coach.disclaimer_inline: I'm not a doctor. For dose changes or serious symptoms, talk to your provider.
coach.example_1: What should I eat if I have nausea?
coach.example_2: I missed a dose — what do I do?
coach.example_3: How do I rotate injection sites?

paywall.title: Go Pro
